author: lOrm
content:
## OC current-behavior spec (HEAD ba62e46d) ‚Äî Phase-2 pin

Describes plan-mode and worktree control behavior as implemented TODAY.

## B1 ‚Äî `execute_enter_plan_mode()` agent-context guard
**OC location**: `src/tools/plan_mode.rs:74-85`; thread-local `IN_AGENT_TASK` `:7-15`; `AgentContextGuard` `:28-66`.
**Contract**: `() -> (String, bool)`. If `in_agent_task()` (thread-local `Cell<bool>` set by an outer `AgentContextGuard::enter()`) returns true ‚Üí `("plan mode cannot be entered from inside an agent task", true)` (fix #620). Otherwise emits `json!({"type": ENTER_PLAN_MODE_MARKER}).to_string()` paired with `false`. The marker is a typed control signal the REPL intercepts; the tool itself is stateless. Multiple calls are idempotent at the tool layer ‚Äî the same JSON is returned each time.
**Edge cases**: Nested `AgentContextGuard` instances are reference-counted by `owns: bool` ‚Äî only the OUTERMOST guard clears the flag on drop.
**Error paths**: Only the agent-context refusal sets `is_error=true`; no JSON validation (no args).

## B2 ‚Äî `execute_exit_plan_mode(args)` strict `allowed_prompts` validation
**OC location**: `src/tools/plan_mode.rs:95-135`.
**Contract**: `(args: &HashMap<String, Value>) -> (String, bool)`. `allowed_prompts` handling: `None | Value::Null` ‚Üí empty vec; `Value::Array(arr)` ‚Üí `arr.clone()`; any other shape (`String`, `Bool`, `Number`, `Object`) ‚Üí `(format!("allowed_prompts must be an array, got {kind}"), true)` (fix #933). Each element must be an object with `tool: string` and `prompt: string` fields; missing fields return `("allowed_prompts[{i}] missing 'tool' field" / "missing 'prompt' field", true)`. On success returns `json!({"type": EXIT_PLAN_MODE_MARKER, "allowed_prompts": arr}).to_string()` paired with `false`.
**Edge cases**: Empty `allowed_prompts: []` is valid. Marker payload deliberately carries NO `prePlanMode` field ‚Äî the session layer (`PlanModeState::previous_mode`) owns the snapshot, not the tool (pinned by `exit_plan_mode_marker_payload_has_no_pre_plan_mode_field_618`).
**Error paths**: All validation failures return `(message, true)`.

## B3 ‚Äî REPL `handle_enter_plan_mode` plan-file pinning
**OC location**: `src/cli/repl/plan_mode.rs:24-104`.
**Contract**: `(&mut ChatSession) -> String`. Steps: (1) `create_dir_all(".openclaudia/plans")`; canonicalize. (2) Sanitize `session.id` ‚Äî keep `alphanumeric | '-' | '_'`, replace others with `'_'`; empty ‚Üí `"Invalid session ID for plan file"`. (3) Compose `plan_file = plans_dir.join("{safe_id}.md")`. (4) If absent, write header `"# Implementation Plan\n\nSession: {id}\nCreated: {UTC}\n\n## Plan\n\n"`. (5) Snapshot `previous_mode = if chat_session.mode == Plan { None } else { Some(mode.as_token()) }` (fix #618). (6) Call `PlanModeState::enter_with_previous_mode(plan_file, previous_mode)` which performs TOCTOU-safe identity pinning: `symlink_metadata` (reject symlinks), `File::open` (pin inode), FD-based `metadata` (reject non-regular), `canonicalize` (store as `plan_realpath`) ‚Äî fix #334. (7) Mutate `chat_session.plan_mode = Some(state)`, `chat_session.mode = AgentMode::Plan`.
**Edge cases**: Any failure in the identity pin returns `"Failed to enter plan mode (plan file identity pin failed): {e}"` without flipping mode.

## B4 ‚Äî REPL `handle_exit_plan_mode` approve / reject / edit
**OC location**: `src/cli/repl/plan_mode.rs:172-273`.
**Contract**: `(&mut ChatSession, allowed_prompts_json: &str) -> (String, bool)` where `bool` is `approved`. If `plan_mode` absent or `!state.active` ‚Üí `("Not currently in plan mode.", false)`. Reads `plan_file`, prints it to stdout, prompts `Approve? [y/n/edit]`. On `y|yes`: parses allowed_prompts JSON, calls `restore_previous_mode(plan_mode.as_ref())` (decodes `previous_mode` token via `AgentMode::from_token` ‚Äî unknown tokens fall back to `Build`, fix #618), sets `plan_mode = None`, `mode = restored`, `approved_plan = Some(plan_content)`, pushes a `system` message containing `"[Approved Implementation Plan]\n..."` + plan + optional "Allowed operations:" block. Returns `("Plan approved by user. Full tool access restored. Proceed with implementation according to the plan.", true)`. On `n|no` ‚Üí stays in plan mode, returns `("Plan rejected by user...", false)`. On `edit|e` ‚Üí opens `$EDITOR` (default `vi`) on plan file, re-prompts after edit. Any other input ‚Üí `"Unrecognized response. Still in plan mode."`.
**Edge cases**: Editor failure leaves session in plan mode. Stdin read failure returns `("Failed to read user input.", false)`.

## B5 ‚Äî `is_tool_allowed_in_plan_mode_with_policy` decision flow
**OC location**: `src/session/state.rs:386-481`; allowlist `:303-316`; `PLAN_MODE_ALLOWED_TOOLS = ["read_file", "list_files", "grep", "web_fetch", "web_search", "web_browser", "ask_user_question", "task", "agent_output", "todo_read", "chainlink", "bash_output"]`.
**Contract**: 5-step hard default-deny (fix #341): (1) `tool.starts_with("mcp__") && !policy.allow_mcp_tools` ‚Üí deny. (2) `tool.starts_with("plugin__") && !policy.allow_plugin_tools` ‚Üí deny. (3) `enter_plan_mode` | `exit_plan_mode` ‚Üí allow. (4) `write_file` special case: extract `args.path`, run TOCTOU-safe identity gate against `plan_realpath` ‚Äî `symlink_metadata` (reject symlinks) + `File::open` + FD-based `metadata` (reject non-regular) + `canonicalize`, compare to `plan_realpath` (NEVER re-canonicalize `plan_realpath` itself ‚Äî that re-opens the cwd-swap bypass closed by #334). (5) Tool name in `PLAN_MODE_ALLOWED_TOOLS` ‚Üí allow. (6) Otherwise ‚Üí deny.
**Edge cases**: A malicious MCP server registering `mcp__evil__read_file` is rejected at step 1 BEFORE the allowlist is consulted. Late-registered MCP/plugin tools without the prefix would still hit the default-deny at step 6. `write_file` to a symlink, non-regular file, or path that fails to canonicalize ‚Üí deny.
**Error paths**: This is a pure `-> bool` predicate; no errors surface ‚Äî any IO failure is treated as "deny".
**Invariants**: Plan-mode policy is hard default-deny; no fall-through path exists. `PlanModePolicy::allow_mcp_tools` / `allow_plugin_tools` (default `false`) only LIFT the prefix gate, never bypass the allowlist.

## B6 ‚Äî `check_plan_mode_restriction` REPL hook
**OC location**: `src/cli/repl/plan_mode.rs:276-308`.
**Contract**: `(&ChatSession, tool_name, tool_args) -> Option<String>`. Returns `None` (allow) when `plan_mode` is `None` or `!state.active`. Parses `tool_args` JSON (invalid ‚Üí `Value::Null`). Delegates to `is_tool_allowed_in_plan_mode(name, plan_realpath, &args)`; on `false` returns `Some(error_string)` naming the blocked tool and the plan file. Uses the pinned `plan_realpath`, NOT the user-facing `plan_file` (fix #334).
